State Tracking:   ✅ Active to .cache/youtube-dms-state.json

Data Sources:
  • /tmp/new-dms.json ..................... Ready (auto-delete after process)
  • DM_JSON environment variable ........... Ready
  • .cache/youtube-dm-inbox.jsonl ......... Ready (JSONL format)

================================================================================
📋 DM INGESTION INSTRUCTIONS
================================================================================

To send new DMs for processing, use ONE of these methods:

METHOD 1 - Temp Queue (Easiest):
  cat > /tmp/new-dms.json << 'JSON'
  [
    {
      "timestamp": "2026-04-15T10:30:00Z",
      "sender": "Name",
      "sender_id": "UCxxxxx",
      "text": "Your message here",
      "dm_id": "optional"
    }
  ]
  JSON

METHOD 2 - Environment Variable:
  export DM_JSON='[{"timestamp":"...","sender":"...","text":"..."}]'

METHOD 3 - Input Queue (JSONL):
  echo '{"timestamp":"...","sender":"...","text":"..."}' >> .cache/youtube-dm-inbox.jsonl

Then run: python3 .cache/youtube-dm-monitor-standalone.py

================================================================================
🚀 QUICK START
================================================================================

1. SEND A TEST DM:
   cat > /tmp/new-dms.json << 'JSON'
   [{"timestamp": "2026-04-15T10:30:00Z", "sender": "Test", "sender_id": "test", 
     "text": "How do I get started?", "dm_id": "test1"}]
   JSON

2. RUN THE MONITOR:
   cd /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace
   python3 .cache/youtube-dm-monitor-standalone.py

3. CHECK THE REPORT:
   cat .cache/youtube-dms-report.txt

4. REVIEW DMs:
   tail -5 .cache/youtube-dms.jsonl | jq .

5. REVIEW PARTNERSHIPS:
   cat .cache/youtube-flagged-partnerships.jsonl | jq .
